title: Kage messaging is own-story only — no competitor comparison/teardown content
summary: Outbound and repo marketing for Kage must be about Kage's own value verified, git native, team shared, code grounded memory , not framed against competitors. Do not create or post comparison/teardown content e.g. 'Kage v
body: Outbound and repo marketing for Kage must be about Kage's own value (verified, git-native, team-shared, code-grounded memory), not framed against competitors. Do not create or post comparison/teardown content (e.g. 'Kage vs claude-mem'). This matches launch/CHECKLIST.md 'own story only — no competitor names, no teardown angle in outbound'. Maintainer corrected this when a claude-mem comparison set was created; those files were removed.
